typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		registry as string,
		repo as string,
		tag as string,
		id as string,
		{distro distroRelease} as string,
		numHosts as integer,
		hosts as string,
		cve as string,
		severity as string,
		packageName as string,
		packageVersion as string,
		cvss as string,
		status as string,
		cause as string,
		discovered as string,
		published as string,
		namespaces as string,
		scanTime as string,
		description as string,
		labels as string,
		clusters as string,
		EnvSource as string,
		App_ID as string,
		wf_guid as string,
		bsns_app_name as string,
		ci_type as string,
		install_status as string,
		operational_status as string,
		bsns_app_classification as string,
		short_dsc as string,
		soc_1 as string,
		sox_significant_code as string,
		data_classification as string,
		publicly_accessible as string,
		pci as string,
		hdpa as string,
		lob as string,
		lob_normalized as string,
		paa_hosting_type_code as string,
		customer_facing_code as string,
		glba_flag as string,
		criticality_score as string,
		WF_ThreatScore as double,
		WF_ThreatRating as string,
		Compliant as string,
		{Due Date} as date,
		App_ID_From_Label as string,
		{Cloud App ID} as string,
		ShortAppID as string,
		{Application Name} as string,
		AUOwner as string,
		{Line Of Business} as string,
		cost_center_cio as string,
		cost_center_cio_direct as string,
		{Prod/Non-Prod} as string,
		Owner as string,
		Cloud_Type as string,
		Cloud_Environment as string,
		TagDate as date,
		Prisma_VIID as string,
		Prisma_VIID_HashValue as string,
		PackagePath as string,
		Level_3_CTO as string,
		{Primary Owner} as string,
		{Vuln Type} as string,
		First_Detected as timestamp,
		Last_Detected as timestamp,
		Vuln_Status as string,
		Reopened_Counter as integer,
		InsertedDateTime as timestamp,
		UpdatedDateTime as timestamp,
		InsertedBy as string,
		UpdatedBy as string,
		collections as string,
		Record_Type as integer,
		managed_by as string,
		supported_by as string,
		cio_level_1 as string,
		cio_level_2 as string,
		cio_level_3 as string,
		primary_tech_manager as string,
		primary_tech_manager_email as string,
		alternate_tech_manager as string,
		alternate_tech_manager_email as string,
		summary_fix_alignment as string,
		primary_owner as string,
		trtc as string,
		trpc as string,
		pkgsType as string,
		package_purl as string,
		tas_foundation as string,
		tas_org_name as string,
		tas_space_name as string,
		tas_application_name as string,
		tas_component_lifecycle as string,
		tas_component_lifecycle_sync_date as date,
		tas_buildpacks as string,
		scan_date as date,
		solution_key as string,
		wf_solution_available as string,
		wf_solution_date as date,
		earliest_discovered as date,
		product_owner as string,
		gameplan as string,
		solution_description as string,
		false_positive_status as string,
		false_positive_ticket as string,
		data_issue as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        * FROM            CAR_VulnRepts.dbo.vwPrisma_Enriched_Infra_DateFiltered "With"(NoLock) WHERE        cost_center_cio LIKE \'TECHCOO%\' OR                          cost_center_cio LIKE \'TECHCDOT%\'',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> vwPrismaEnrichedInfraDateFiltered
vwPrismaEnrichedInfraDateFiltered derive({Copy of hosts} = toString(hosts),
		{Copy of Prisma_VIID} = Prisma_VIID,
		{Copy of id} = id) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion derive({Derived Column 1} = trim(Copy_of_Prisma_VIID) + ';' + trim(Copy_of_id) + ';' + trim(Copy_of_hosts)) ~> DerivedColumn1
DerivedColumn1 derive(Import_Date = toDate(toString(currentTimestamp(), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy")) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(input(
		ShortAppID as string,
		Owner as string,
		operational_status as string,
		bsns_app_name as string,
		lob_normalized as string,
		Prisma_VIID_HashValue as string,
		scanTime as string,
		wf_guid as string,
		sox_significant_code as string,
		Record_Type as integer,
		Line_Of_Business as string,
		EnvSource as string,
		UpdatedBy as string,
		{Prod_Non-Prod} as string,
		cost_center_cio as string,
		TagDate as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		collections as string,
		customer_facing_code as string,
		tag as string,
		id as string,
		bsns_app_classification as string,
		paa_hosting_type_code as string,
		Primary_Owner as string,
		hosts as string,
		cost_center_cio_direct as string,
		Vuln_Type as string,
		InsertedDateTime as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		published as string,
		primary_tech_manager as string,
		distro_distroRelease as string,
		Cloud_Environment as string,
		labels as string,
		Compliant as string,
		Level_3_CTO as string,
		Reopened_Counter as integer,
		UID as string,
		install_status as string,
		cio_level_2 as string,
		cio_level_1 as string,
		supported_by as string,
		WF_ThreatScore as double,
		primary_tech_manager_email as string,
		cio_level_3 as string,
		UpdatedDateTime as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		WF_ThreatRating as string,
		cvss as string,
		lob as string,
		Cloud_Type as string,
		status as string,
		namespaces as string,
		numHosts as string,
		publicly_accessible as string,
		criticality_score as string,
		primary_owner as string,
		discovered as string,
		Cloud_App_ID as string,
		managed_by as string,
		repo as string,
		cause as string,
		description as string,
		First_Detected as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		AUOwner as string,
		App_ID as string,
		short_dsc as string,
		data_classification as string,
		cve as string,
		ci_type as string,
		pci as string,
		Vuln_Status as string,
		Prisma_VIID as string,
		packageName as string,
		hdpa as string,
		clusters as string,
		App_ID_From_Label as string,
		InsertedBy as string,
		severity as string,
		registry as string,
		Due_Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Application_Name as string,
		alternate_tech_manager as string,
		alternate_tech_manager_email as string,
		packageVersion as string,
		Import_Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		summary_fix_alignment as string,
		soc_1 as string,
		Last_Detected as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		glba_flag as string,
		PackagePath as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ShortAppID,
		Owner,
		operational_status,
		bsns_app_name,
		lob_normalized,
		Prisma_VIID_HashValue,
		scanTime,
		wf_guid,
		sox_significant_code,
		Record_Type,
		Line_Of_Business = {Line Of Business},
		EnvSource,
		UpdatedBy,
		{Prod_Non-Prod} = {Prod/Non-Prod},
		cost_center_cio,
		TagDate,
		collections,
		customer_facing_code,
		tag,
		id,
		bsns_app_classification,
		paa_hosting_type_code,
		Primary_Owner = {Primary Owner},
		hosts,
		cost_center_cio_direct,
		Vuln_Type = {Vuln Type},
		InsertedDateTime,
		published,
		primary_tech_manager,
		distro_distroRelease = {distro distroRelease},
		Cloud_Environment,
		labels,
		Compliant,
		Level_3_CTO,
		Reopened_Counter,
		UID = {Derived Column 1},
		install_status,
		cio_level_2,
		cio_level_1,
		supported_by,
		WF_ThreatScore,
		primary_tech_manager_email,
		cio_level_3,
		UpdatedDateTime,
		WF_ThreatRating,
		cvss,
		lob,
		Cloud_Type,
		status,
		namespaces,
		numHosts,
		publicly_accessible,
		criticality_score,
		primary_owner,
		discovered,
		Cloud_App_ID = {Cloud App ID},
		managed_by,
		repo,
		cause,
		description,
		First_Detected,
		AUOwner,
		App_ID,
		short_dsc,
		data_classification,
		cve,
		ci_type,
		pci,
		Vuln_Status,
		Prisma_VIID,
		packageName,
		hdpa,
		clusters,
		App_ID_From_Label,
		InsertedBy,
		severity,
		registry,
		Due_Date = {Due Date},
		Application_Name = {Application Name},
		alternate_tech_manager,
		alternate_tech_manager_email,
		packageVersion,
		Import_Date,
		summary_fix_alignment,
		soc_1,
		Last_Detected,
		glba_flag,
		PackagePath)) ~> OLEDBDestination
